source.name: Lab 5.1: Using Actions in Flows.
source.instructions:
To pass this assessment, all of the following checks must pass (in level2/data/basics/):

• Check 1: hours.yml exists.
• Check 2: hours flow exists (flows:, hours:).
• Check 3: hours flow uses action_bank_hours in steps.
• Check 4: holiday_hours.yml exists.
• Check 5: holiday_hours flow exists and uses action_holiday_hours in steps.
• Check 6: holiday_hours flow has name: and description:.
source.guidance: The grader checks that data/basics/hours.yml and data/basics/holiday_hours.yml exist and define flows that use the correct actions.
